candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line, but nothing in the excerpt indicates it is specifically tied to COGS/cost of sales. No COGS reference bucket was selected, so adding this to COGS would risk misclassification.
Separate operating amortization line, but not identified as COGS-related and no COGS parent bucket was selected. Conservative treatment is not to assign it to COGS.
Looks like a component of the broader Depreciation line rather than a standalone COGS-specific D&A row. Also not explicitly tied to cost of sales.
Balancing row, not a standalone operating D&A expense to add separately.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS/cost of sales bucket exists in the selected reference rows, and the visible D&A rows are generic operating expenses rather than clearly COGS-related. Conservative no-add treatment avoids misclassification and double counting.

candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation line presented alongside Other external costs and Personnel costs, so it appears outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket and should be added separately.
Separate operating amortization line at the same level as the selected overhead rows. It appears outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket and should be added separately.
Likely a component detail of the broader Depreciation row, so selecting both would double count. Prefer the summary row Depreciation.
Balancing row rather than an operating D&A expense line to add.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket contains only Other external costs and Personnel costs. Because explicit D&A lines appear separately above operating result and are not shown as subcomponents of those selected rows, they should be added separately. Excluded Machinery and equipment - Depreciation as a component of Depreciation, and excluded the balancing row.
